_comment: Pass thresholds per effect. `default` applies unless overridden in perEffect. Calibrate on the first real run against Photo Booth references, then freeze. ssim/edgeIoU are minimums; mae is a maximum (0..255). Colour effects (recolours) keep geometry so edgeIoU stays high, but mae/ssim diverge from Photo Booth's exact colour mapping — the loose bars below are placeholders to replace after the first real capture.
